description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Make CI (DeepLearning for Ubuntu Linux) that runs on every push to all branches and on all pull requests to any branch. Use an ubuntu-20.04 job with a matrix strategy to test different editions (YANEURAOU_ENGINE_DEEP_ORT_CPU, YANEURAOU_ENGINE_DEEP_TENSOR_RT), compilers (g++-10, g++-11, clang++-11, clang++-12, clang++-13, clang++-14, clang++-15), targets (normal), and architectures (AVX2). For each matrix combination, install the required compiler, ONNX Runtime (if applicable), and CUDA with TensorRT (if applicable), then build the project using a custom script.
